description: An auditor tests the company's compliance with GDPR requirements, specifically the 'right to be forgotten'.

nodes.task_description: Submit a test request through the company's public privacy portal to have a test user's data deleted.

expected_outcome.expected: A data deletion request is submitted.

nodes.task_description: Track the request through the internal ticketing system to ensure it is handled within the 30-day requirement.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor confirms the request is processed within the required timeframe.

nodes.task_description: After the request is closed, perform a search of the production databases to ensure the test user's data has actually been deleted.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor confirms the data has been successfully purged from all systems.
